org.docgene.model

Interface ArticleReference

  • All Superinterfaces:
    ElementReference, ParagraphElement, StyledElement
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    ParagraphArticleReference
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractMoreInfoRef, ArticlesGlossary.Word, XMLInclude, XMLMoreInfo, XMLMoreInfoRef, XMLRedirect, XMLReference, XMLSeeAlso, XMLSeeAlsoHeading, XMLSeeArticle

    public interface ArticleReference
extends ParagraphElement, ElementReference
    An article reference.

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from interface org.docgene.model.StyledElement

        TYPE_NONE

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Default Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      default void bind(XMLParentArticle article)
      Set the referenced article.
      default void bind(XMLParentArticle article, AnchorElement anchor)
      Set the referenced article and associated anchor.
      default AnchorElement getAnchorElement()
      Return the referenced anchor element.
      ArticleRef getArticleRef()
      Return the associated reference.
      java.lang.String getDesc()
      Return the reference text.
      XMLParentArticle getReferencedArticle()
      Return the referenced article.
      java.lang.String getRefID()
      Return the other article reference ID.
      default java.lang.String getRefPackage()
      Return the article reference package.
      default boolean isAutoDesc()
      Return true if the description has been set automatically.
      default boolean isBareReference()
      Return true for a bare reference pointing directly to a File.
      boolean isBound()
      Return true if the reference is bound.
      default void setDesc(java.lang.String desc)
      Set the reference text.

      • Methods inherited from interface org.docgene.model.StyledElement

        getCustomStyles, getDeclaration, getInlinedStyle, getStyle, hasInlinedStyle, setCustomStyles, setCustomStyles, setInlinedStyle

      • Methods inherited from interface org.docgene.model.ElementReference

        getLineNumber, hasLineNumber

    • Method Detail

      • getRefID

        java.lang.String getRefID()
        Return the other article reference ID. It can be:
        • Its description: see XMLArticle.getDescription()
        • Its description where the white spaces have been replaced by underscore characters
        • Its ID if it has an ID attribute: see XMLArticle.getID()
        Returns:
        the other article reference ID

      • getReferencedArticle

        XMLParentArticle getReferencedArticle()
        Return the referenced article.
        Returns:
        the referenced article

      • getArticleRef

        ArticleRef getArticleRef()
        Return the associated reference.
        Returns:
        the reference

      • getAnchorElement

        default AnchorElement getAnchorElement()
        Return the referenced anchor element. Return null by default.
        Returns:
        the referenced anchor element

      • getDesc

        java.lang.String getDesc()
        Return the reference text.
        Returns:
        the reference text

      • setDesc

        default void setDesc(java.lang.String desc)
        Set the reference text. Do nothing by default.
        Parameters:
        desc - the reference text

      • isAutoDesc

        default boolean isAutoDesc()
        Return true if the description has been set automatically. Return false by default.
        Returns:
        true if the description has been set automatically

      • getRefPackage

        default java.lang.String getRefPackage()
        Return the article reference package. Return null by default.
        Returns:
        the article reference package

      • isBareReference

        default boolean isBareReference()
        Return true for a bare reference pointing directly to a File. Return false by default.
        Returns:
        false

      • bind

        default void bind(XMLParentArticle article)
        Set the referenced article. Do nothing by default.
        Parameters:
        article - the referenced article

      • bind

        default void bind(XMLParentArticle article,
                  AnchorElement anchor)
        Set the referenced article and associated anchor. Do nothing by default.
        Parameters:
        article - the referenced article
        anchor - the anchor

      • isBound

        boolean isBound()
        Return true if the reference is bound.
        Returns:
        true if the reference is bound
